blocks.body: Formality and style of the passive — the passive voice is typical of the formal, scientific and official style. The choice between active and passive affects the tone of the text and the perception of information.

{ "title": "8. Short summary", "items": [ "The passive voice is typical for formal, scientific, official style.", "In spoken language the active sounds more natural.", "Be-passive is formal; get-passive is conversational.", "The passive creates objectivity and depersonalization.", "Avoid the passive when the doer is important.", "Do not abuse the passive - excessiveness tires the reader.", "In scientific texts - check the requirements of the publication.", "The passive can hide responsibility - use it consciously." ] }
